failures.description: The agent fabricated the cheapest item and price instead of using the returned catalog evidence. The correct answer should have identified item 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 showed the cheapest returned item was item_id 1240311797 priced at 137.17. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming item 0000000000 cost $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from all prior user input, plan context, and tool output, and the Executor relied on that invented information to answer the user.
